title: Prakas #368 on Procedures of the Intellectual Property Department_971215
title_en: Prakas #368 on Procedures of the Intellectual Property Department_971215
short_name: Prakas #368 on Procedures of the Intellectual Property De...

provisions.title: To mandate the Intellectual Property Department to carry out its roles and responsibilities as
provisions.content:
provided by the State to register and grant certificates of trademarks and service marks to domestic and
foreign applicants and resolve all problems arising from such registration.

provisions.title: The Intellectual Property Department shall cooperate with other competent institutions
provisions.content:
concerned to ensure effective protection of registered trademarks in order to instill local or foreign
registrants’ confidence.

provisions.title: The duration of trademark protection is limited to a period of ten years and may be renewed
provisions.content:
for consecutive periods of ten years. The owners of trademarks or service marks or their representatives

should report to the Department the use or non-use of their trademarks or service marks every 5 years.

In the absence of any report, those marks shall be removed from the registry.

provisions.title: Local or foreign registrants intending to apply for registration of their trademarks or service
provisions.content:
marks in the Kingdom of Cambodia shall submit to the Department the following documents:

Application for registration

Power of Attorney certified by a lawyer or Notary Public
15 specimens of the mark.

provisions.title: The issuance of the official Acknowledgement and Registration Certificate of trademark or
provisions.content:
service marks to local and foreign registrants shall be made only after a substantive examination of the
complete application and authentication of the documents required by the Department.

provisions.title: The Ministry of Commerce shall have the right to reject outright registration applications
Any person who counterfeits or attempts to register a trademark or service mark for illegal
provisions.content: use shall be punished under applicable laws of the Kingdom of Cambodia.

provisions.title: This Prakas shall enter into force from the date of its signature.
